title: Maximum Difference by Remapping a Digit
titleCn: 替换一个数字后的最大差值

testcases.input: num = 11891 Output: 99009 Explanation: To achieve the maximum value, Bob can remap the digit 1 to the digit 9 to yield 99899. To achieve the minimum value, Bob can remap the digit 1 to the digit 0, yielding 890. The difference between these two numbers is 99009.
testcases.expectedOutput: 99009 Explanation: To achieve the maximum value, Bob can remap the digit 1 to the digit 9 to yield 99899. To achieve the minimum value, Bob can remap the digit 1 to the digit 0, yielding 890. The difference between these two numbers is 99009.

testcases.input: num = 90 Output: 99 Explanation: The maximum value that can be returned by the function is 99 (if 0 is replaced by 9) and the minimum value that can be returned by the function is 0 (if 9 is replaced by 0). Thus, we return 99.
testcases.expectedOutput: 99 Explanation: The maximum value that can be returned by the function is 99 (if 0 is replaced by 9) and the minimum value that can be returned by the function is 0 (if 9 is replaced by 0). Thus, we return 99.
